title: 5MP season 3
description:
The official modpack for fi5hii's SMP (called 5MP) season 3.

5MP is an expansive RPG modpack designed for an immersive and challenging Minecraft experience. It introduces deep progression systems, unique character classes, and a rich world generation.
body:
_This is the official modpack for [fi5hii](https://twitch.tv/fi5hii)'s SMP season 3_

Embark on an epic journey in 5MP, a fully immersive RPG adventure modpack designed for Minecraft 1.20.1. Featuring a vast array of RPG mechanics, deep progression systems, and a richly enhanced world, this modpack is perfect for players who love adventure, magic, and combat.

🟠 **Classes & Progression** – Choose from diverse RPG classes such as Archers, Warriors, Wizards, Death Knights, and Paladins, each with unique abilities and skill trees (LevelZ, Simply Skills, More RPG Library).

🟠 **Expansive World** – Explore reimagined structures with YUNG's Better Structures, delve into Better Nether & End, and uncover forgotten dungeons, castles, and deep lore.

🟠 **Magic & Enchantments** – Master powerful spells with Spell Engine, craft legendary magical gear with Elemental Enchantments, and dive into dark magic with Bewitchment.

🟠 **Challenging Combat** – Face formidable Mob Captains, take on Creeper Overhaul variants, and engage in tactical battles with reworked weapons and armor.

🟠 **Rich Economy & Loot** – Engage in bounty hunting (Bountiful), trade with villagers in the new economy system (Numismatic Overhaul), and seek hidden treasures in Deeper and Darker.

🟠 **Multiplayer Ready** – Seamless Simple Voice Chat and Fair Wage ensure an immersive and balanced cooperative experience.

🟠 **Performance & Visuals** – Optimized with Sodium, Starlight, FerriteCore, and enriched with shaders (Iris Shaders), dynamic lighting (LambDynamicLights), and beautiful UI enhancements.

Whether you seek to become a legendary warrior, a master spellcaster, or a cunning rogue, 5MP offers an endless adventure filled with danger, discovery, and magic. Gather your allies, choose your path, and forge your legend today!
